questions.question: What was the final score of Tottenham's Champions League match against Atletico Madrid?
questions.explanation: Tottenham suffered a 5-2 defeat at Atletico Madrid in the Champions League last-16 tie.

questions.question: In which minute was Tottenham goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky substituted during the Atletico Madrid match?
questions.explanation: Kinsky was replaced in the 17th minute after Tottenham had already conceded three goals.

questions.question: How many points did Bam Adebayo score in his record-breaking game for the Miami Heat?
questions.explanation: Bam Adebayo scored 83 points in a single game, which is the second-highest individual game score after Wilt Chamberlain's record.

questions.question: What nationality is Jack Dempsey, who plays as a number eight?
questions.explanation: Jack Dempsey, now a Scotland powerhouse, was previously cast off by Australia for lacking physicality.

questions.question: According to Fifa President Infantino, what did Donald Trump say about Iran's participation in the World Cup?
questions.explanation: Trump stated that Iran are 'welcome' to take part in this summer's World Cup despite the countries being at war.

questions.question: Which Premier League team's corner-kick dominance is mentioned as a concern that other teams are trying to stop?
questions.explanation: The article discusses Arsenal's corner-kick dominance and whether the Premier League could learn from Kidderminster's defensive approach.

questions.question: What did German cross-country skiers do on the Winter Paralympics podium in protest?
options: Turned their backs on Russian gold medallists
questions.explanation: German skiers turned their backs on Russian gold medallists to protest Russia's inclusion at the Paralympics.

questions.question: Which police chief criticized Celtic and Rangers after the Old Firm disorder at Ibrox?
questions.explanation: Chief Constable Jo Farrell criticized both clubs for failing to condemn the disorder that occurred during the Old Firm match at Ibrox.

questions.question: Which three nations are in contention for the 2026 Six Nations title according to the article?
questions.explanation: The Six Nations preview highlights a three-horse race between Ireland, Scotland, and France for the 2026 title.

questions.question: Which horse has been confirmed to compete in Friday's Cheltenham Gold Cup under Harry Redknapp?
questions.explanation: Harry Redknapp's horse 'Jukebox Man' has been confirmed for the Cheltenham Gold Cup, joining 10 other horses in the field.
